matches.text: def coeff (hs : IsLocalFrameOn I F n s u) (i : ι) : (Π x : M, V x) →ₗ[𝕜] M → 𝕜 where
matches.snippet:
/-- Coefficients of a section `s` of `V` w.r.t. a local frame `{s i}` on `u`.
Outside of `u`, this returns the junk value 0. -/
def coeff (hs : IsLocalFrameOn I F n s u) (i : ι) : (Π x : M, V x) →ₗ[𝕜] M → 𝕜 where
  toFun s x := if hx : x ∈ u then (hs.toBasisAt hx).repr (s x) i else 0
  map_add' s s' := by
    ext x
    by_cases hx : x ∈ u <;> simp [hx]
  map_smul' c s := by
    ext x
    by_cases hx : x ∈ u <;> simp [hx]

variable {x : M}

@[simp]

matches.text: def coeff (p : FormalMultilinearSeries 𝕜 𝕜 E) (n : ℕ) : E :=
def constantCoeff : MvPowerSeries σ R →+* R :=
matches.snippet:
/-- The constant coefficient of a formal power series. -/
def constantCoeff : MvPowerSeries σ R →+* R :=
  { coeff (0 : σ →₀ ℕ) with
    toFun := coeff (0 : σ →₀ ℕ)
    map_one' := coeff_zero_one
    map_mul' := fun φ ψ => by classical simp [coeff_mul]
    map_zero' := map_zero _ }

@[simp]

/-- The constant coefficient of a formal power series. -/
def constantCoeff : R⟦X⟧ →+* R :=
  MvPowerSeries.constantCoeff

/-- The constant formal power series. -/

lemma prod_range_succ' (f : ℕ → M) (n : ℕ) :
    ((range n.succ).map f).prod = f 0 * ((range n).map fun i ↦ f i.succ).prod := by
  rw [range_succ_eq_map]
  simp [Function.comp_def]

@[to_additive] lemma prod_eq_one (hl : ∀ x ∈ l, x = 1) : l.prod = 1 := by
  induction l with
  | nil => rfl
  | cons i l hil =>
    rw [List.prod_cons, hil fun x hx ↦ hl _ (mem_cons_of_mem i hx),
      hl _ mem_cons_self, one_mul]

@[to_additive] lemma exists_mem_ne_one_of_prod_ne_one (h : l.prod ≠ 1) :
    ∃ x ∈ l, x ≠ (1 : M) := by simpa only [not_forall, exists_prop] using mt prod_eq_one h

@[to_additive]

theorem prod_range_succ (f : ℕ → M) (n : ℕ) :
    (∏ x ∈ range (n + 1), f x) = (∏ x ∈ range n, f x) * f n := by
  simp only [mul_comm, prod_range_succ_comm]

@[to_additive]
